clusters.justification: These terms map onto limbic and salience network co-activations underlying the broad macroscopic axis of generating, perceiving, and regulating emotional and visceral states.

These terms consistently recruit frontostriatal and dopaminergic pathways to support the latent cognitive axis of computing subjective value, processing reinforcement, and motivating goal-directed action.
These terms reflect overlapping default mode network engagement along the latent functional axis of constructing and maintaining complex internal representations of both the self and other agents.
